gates.title: Flagship Playwright suite covers the manual failure modes
gates.summary: The flagship Playwright suite exists and names controls, KO/reset, artifact, performance, and audio gates.

gates.title: A/D/S/Space/Shift/Q/J/K/L/P/R controls are release-gated
gates.summary: The flagship suite must exercise every shipped keyboard control, including down, guard, special, pause, and reset.

gates.title: Runtime proof publishes controls evidence every frame
gates.summary: window.__AURA_CLASH_ARENA_PROOF__ must include controls.lastInput, downSupported, specialRequiresMeter, koLocked, and resetCount in the normal writeProof path.

gates.title: Flagship proof rejects same-model tinting and training mannequin fighters
gates.summary: The flagship route must publish player/rival typed fighter asset ids, URLs, hashes, distinctness, and release readiness. Same-model tinting and the training mannequin must fail release gates.

gates.title: KO lock and reset behavior are release-gated
gates.summary: The flagship suite must prove KO cannot keep taking damage or repeat attacks until reset, and reset clears the round.

gates.title: Normal-play hit VFX are not debug cubes or generic box artifacts
gates.summary: The normal hit-effect path must be a designed VFX path, not lit cube render items.

gates.title: Flagship proof exposes explicit performance budgets
gates.summary: The playable route must publish performance.frameTimeMs, fps, drawCalls, and budgetOk and the test suite must enforce thresholds.

gates.title: Flagship proof exposes audio readiness instead of silent placeholders
gates.summary: The playable route must publish audio readiness with music, SFX, mute, and last cue evidence.

gates.title: Dedicated visual-regression spec captures the required Aura Clash states
gates.summary: The PRD-required visual states must live in a dedicated Playwright spec and write contextual screenshot artifacts.

gates.title: Dedicated performance-budget spec enforces frame, draw, JS, CSS, and GLB budgets
gates.summary: Performance proof must be a dedicated Playwright gate instead of only route text.

gates.title: Dedicated asset-quality spec validates final fighter assets
gates.summary: Final fighter assets must be validated independently from the broad flagship suite.

gates.title: Dedicated audio spec validates unlock and gameplay cue proof
gates.summary: Audio readiness must prove user-gesture unlock and gameplay cue publication.

gates.title: Dedicated deployed-playable spec probes route, assets, console, and controls
gates.summary: Deployment parity must be represented by a dedicated Playwright spec that can target local or deployed origins.

gates.title: Flagship gates are runnable from app and root package scripts
gates.summary: The readiness tool, dedicated Playwright specs, and flagship gate runner must be reachable through stable package scripts.
